_comment: Tracks which Cursor chats are distilled. See agent-memory INSTRUCTIONS.md → Session end

_schema.date: transcript file mtime — last activity in chat
_schema.distilled_at: YYYY-MM-DD when distill was merged into projects/*.md
_schema.pointer_source: curated | live | auto — class of last applied Next step
_schema.pointer_set_at: ISO timestamp when pointer_source last changed
_schema.secrets_policy: no passwords/tokens/keys in hub; distill redacts; verify-memory weekly
